mapper.select: SELECT id, content, metadata, (1 - (embedding <=> #{queryVec}::vector)) * 0.7 + COALESCE(ts_rank(to_tsvector('simple', content), to_tsquery('simple', #{tsQuery})), 0) * 0.3 AS hybrid_score FROM public.vector_store WHERE (1 - (embedding <=> #{queryVec}::vector)) >= 0.6 AND metadata ->> 'userId' = #{userId}::text AND metadata ->> 'category' = #{category} ORDER BY hybrid_score DESC LIMIT #{topK}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO public.vector_store (id, content, metadata, embedding) VALUES (#{id}::uuid, #{content}, #{metadata}::json, #{vecStr}::vector)
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM public.vector_store WHERE id::text IN
#{id}
